about: Sanjivani Sports Public School, established by the Viklang Sewa Evam Technical Shiksha Sansthan, is located in the serene surroundings of Assam Road, Semarahana, Nainiha, Mihinpurwa (Bahraich). It is a premier educational institution dedicated to providing holistic education and fostering sporting excellence. We believe in nurturing young minds with a blend of academic rigor and physical development.
vision: To create a global community of lifelong learners who are academically excellent, physically fit, and socially responsible.
mission: To provide a safe, nurturing, and challenging environment that promotes intellectual growth, athletic prowess, and character development.
founderMessage: Education is the most powerful weapon which you can use to change the world. At SSPS, we strive to empower our students with knowledge and values.
managerMessage: We are committed to providing the best infrastructure and facilities to ensure our students excel in every field.
principalMessage: Welcome to SSPS. Our focus is on the all-round development of every child, ensuring they reach their full potential.
